page_content:
Assistant Dean: Dr. Joelle Presson Phone: 301-405-6892 jpresson@umd.edu

Laboratory research, ﬁeldwork, and internships are valuable co-curricular experiences that add value to a student’s academic experience in BSCI disciplines. We encourage students to pursue one or more of these experiences during their undergraduate studies. Please see the College website (http://cmns.umd.edu/undergraduate/research-internships/) for more information about experiential learning for CMNS undergraduates.
